1505100035.english: (When was it? The last time that child called me 'older sister'...)
1505100035.korean: (언제였죠? 그 아이에게 언니라고 마지막으로 불린 적이…)

1505100036.english: So you are the newly created Siete. You seem a bit spaced out; are you okay?
1505100036.korean: 당신이 이번에 새롭게 만들어진 시에테군요.&n조금 멍한 구석이 있어 보이는데 괜찮은 거예요?

1505100038.english: Haa... I heard you got scolded by Dos again. What happened this time? Ah, don't cry... I get it, so please take your time telling me.
1505100038.korean: 하아… 또 도스 님에게 혼났다고 들었는데 이번에는 무슨 일이죠?&n앗, 울지 마세요… 알았으니까 천천히 말해보세요.

1505100040.english: My name? Unlike you, I haven't received a name yet. That is because it hasn't been decided whose name I will inherit.
1505100040.korean: 제 이름이요? 저는 당신과 다르게 아직 이름을 받지 못했어요.&n어떤 분의 이름을 계승하게 될지 아직 정해지지 않았으니까요.

1505100041.english: What? So you're saying you'll call me 'older sister'? That's a bit... Ah, okay! So please don't make that face.
1505100041.korean: 네? 그럼 언니라고 부르겠다고요? 그건 좀…&n아, 알았어요! 그러니까 그런 표정 짓지마세요.

1505100043.english: The person who will succeed me has been decided. I will now take Quattro's place.
1505100043.korean: 제가 계승하게 될 분이 정해졌어요.&n이제 제가 콰트로 님을 대신하게 될 거예요.

1505100044.english: Are you scared right now? I know you're always getting severely scolded by Quattro, but...
1505100044.korean: 지금 겁먹은 건가요?&n당신이 항상 콰트로 님에게 심하게 혼나고 있는 건 알지만…

1505100045.english: You don't have to worry. Just because I take Quattro's place doesn't mean I'll become like him.
1505100045.korean: 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮아요.&n제가 콰트로 님을 대신하게 된다고 해서 콰트로 님처럼 되진 않을 테니까요.

1505100053.english: It’s alright, Master. I was prepared to accept whatever the ending may be.
1505100053.korean: 괜찮아요, 주인님.&n어떤 결말이 되더라도 받아들이기로 각오하고 있었으니까요.

1505100055.english: Are the other team members safe?

1505100057.english: Hehe, I can't wait to see my master.

1505100061.english: Thank you so much for reaching out to me back then… and for letting me call you older sister.
1505100061.korean: 그때 저에게 손을 내밀어 주어서… 언니라고 부르게 해줘서 정말 고마워요.

1505100065.english: [… Beta, connect the Kestos Himas to the Quattro circuit.]

1505100067.english: [I just received a report from Labiata]

1505100068.english: [They say the whole situation is over. The princesses seem to be safe, too.]
1505100068.korean: [모든 상황이 종료됐다고 해. 공주님들도 무사한 모양이고.]

1505100069.english: You really went through a lot without me.

1505100070.english: I feel the same way. I want to see everyone soon.

1505100071.english: I'm scheduled to arrive in Caracas soon, so we'll be able to meet right away.
1505100071.korean: [곧 카라카스에 도착할 예정이니까 긍방 만날 수 있을 거야.]

1505200001.english: Please explain how on earth this happened.
1505200001.korean: 이게 대체 어떻게 된 일인지 설명을 해보시죠.

1505200002.english: I'm talking about why your troops arbitrarily brought goblins and started a fight with Orca.
1505200002.korean: 왜 당신의 병력이 멋대로 고블린들을 데리고 오르카와 싸움을 일으켰는지 말이에요.

1505200003.english: Depending on your answer, I won't let this slide. Zeta…!
1505200003.korean: 대답에 따라서는 그냥 넘어가지 않을 겁니다.&n제타…!

1505200005.english: [I just told the evil dragon to make its own judgments and act accordingly.]

1505200006.english: [He might have thought that attacking Orca right now was the best decision.]
1505200006.korean: [지금 오르카를 공격하는 게 제일 좋은 판단이었다고 생각했을지도 모르죠.]

1505200007.english: Are you calling that an answer?

1505200008.english: Because of you, I ended up revealing the existence of goblins to the last human!
1505200008.korean: 당신 때문에 최후의 인간에게 고블린의 존재를 알리는 꼴이 되어버렸다고요!

1505200009.english: Even though you helped control the goblins, you wouldn't want to get away with it lightly, no matter who you are.
1505200009.korean: 당신이 고블린을 제어하는 데 도움을 주었다지만, 아무리 그런 당신이라고 해도 적당히 넘어갈 생각은 하지 않는 게 좋을 거예요.

1505200012.english: There has been no contact with Gamma since she went to the northern front...
1505200012.korean: 감마는 북부 전선으로 간 이후로 연락이 없고…

1505200013.english: I wonder what on earth Epsilon is doing...

1505200014.english: [Well, something urgent might have come up.]

1505200017.english: For some reason, it feels a bit different from usual.

1505200018.english: It can't be that Alpha is just mimicking it like Delta did...
1505200018.korean: 델타 때처럼 알파가 흉내라도 내는 건 아닐 테고…

1505200021.english: [Omega, you're quite perceptive for someone like you.]

1505200022.english: [You seem to be thinking more than usual… Have you been influenced by anyone?]
1505200022.korean: [여느 때보다 생각을 많이 하는 거 같은데… 누구의 영향이라도 받은 건가요?]

1505200023.english: … What on earth are you up to?

1505200024.english: If they went so far as to show up 'personally' without permission, it wouldn't be something to be taken lightly, would it?
1505200024.korean: 멋대로 '직접' 찾아올 정도면 가볍게 넘어갈 일은 아닐 테지요?

1505200026.english: I don't know how many years it has been since we last met in person like this. Omega.
1505200026.korean: 이렇게 직접 만나는 건 몇 년 만인지 모르겠군요. 오메가.

1505200028.english: Is it really you? That appearance…

1505200029.english: Never mind that question. I've already heard it once.
1505200029.korean: 그 질문은 됐어요.&n이미 한 번 들었으니까요.

1505200030.english: ...Zeta, what on earth are you trying to do?

1505200031.english: Are you planning to become a new being, neither a Bioroid nor an Iron Bug, and even covet the throne of a god?
1505200031.korean: 바이오로이드나 철충이 아닌 새로운 존재가 되어, 신의 자리라도 넘볼 셈인가요?

1505200033.english: I have never once harbored such an arrogant and low-level thought as to ascend to the throne in place of a human.
1505200033.korean: 인간의 자리를 대신하여 왕좌에 오른다는 그런 오만하고 수준 낮은 생각을 가진 적은 단 한 번도 없어요.

1505200034.english: I have simply obtained the box named 'Unknown' placed before my eyes, so I am just opening it.
1505200034.korean: 그저 눈앞에 놓인 미지라는 이름의 상자를 손에 넣었으니 열어볼 뿐이죠.

1505200037.english: If you can observe, grasp, and understand the whole thing, eventually you will be able to control everything.
1505200037.korean: 관측하여 파악하고 그 전부를 이해할 수 있다면, 이윽고 모든 걸 제어할 수 있게 되죠.

1505200038.english: What I am observing through this experiment is that first box and…
1505200038.korean: 제가 이번 실험을 통해 관측하는 건 그 첫 번째 상자이자…

1505200039.english: This is the first assignment 'that person' gave me.
1505200039.korean: 그분'이 저에게 내린 첫 번째 과제예요.

1505200040.english: If it were said that one could observe the secrets and answers of this world by opening a box…
1505200040.korean: 상자를 열어보는 걸로 이 세상의 비밀과 해답을 관측할 수 있다고 한다면…

1505200041.english: Isn't there no option other than opening it?

1505200043.english: Haha, for once you guessed it right.

1505200044.english: That's exactly right. Right now, I am more greedy than anyone else.
1505200044.korean: 그 말대로예요.&n지금의 전 그 누구보다 탐욕스럽답니다.

1505200045.english: Enough to do anything to get what you want.
1505200045.korean: 원하는 바를 손에 넣기 위해서 뭐든지 할 정도로 말이죠.

1505200046.english: To be continued in Part 4 of <The Iron Workshop>…

1505300002.english: She's a member of our New Triaina Expedition's LRL!
1505300002.korean: 우리 뉴 트리아이나 탐험대의 LRL 대원이잖아!

1505300004.english: Ow!? Wait, what's wrong, LRL? Why do you look so upset?
1505300004.korean: 오우!? 잠깐, 왜 그래 LRL 대원!&n왜 그렇게 울상인 거야?

1505300006.english: Alright! Got it! Take your time telling me! I'll listen to everything you have to say!
1505300006.korean: 좋아! 알겠어! 이 언니에게 천천히 말해 봐!&n전부 들어줄 테니까!

1505300007.english: Ahem... So, you're saying the LRL member really wanted to go with the Princess... the Cyclops Princess, but held back because they thought it would be a burden?
1505300007.korean: 흠흠… 그러니까 LRL 대원은 공주님…&n사이클롭스 프린세스를 정말 따라가고 싶었지만, 폐가 될 거라 생각해서 꾹 참았단 말이지?

1505300009.english: That means… you're talking about that transport ship leaving for Caracas soon.
1505300009.korean: 그렇다는 건… 곧 카라카스로 떠나는 저 수송선을 말하는 거구나.

1505300010.english: I know exactly what happened! I understand why you're feeling down!
1505300010.korean: 무슨 일인지는 잘 알겠어!&n침울해하는 것도 이해가 가!

1505300011.english: This Expedition Captain Triaina will praise such an LRL member!
1505300011.korean: 그런 LRL 대원에게는 이 탐사 대장 트리아이나가 칭찬해 줄게!

1505300013.english: The LRL member made a great choice.
1505300013.korean: LRL 대원은 훌륭한 선택을 한 거야.

1505300014.english: I know you're sad about being separated, but that just shows how much the LRL members care for and look after the True Ancestor's princess.
1505300014.korean: 떨어져서 슬픈 건 알지만, 그만큼 LRL 대원이 그 진조의 공주님을 신경 쓰고 배려하고 있다는 거잖아.

1505300015.english: Jinjo's princess must have been happy to know the LRL members' intentions, too!
1505300015.korean: 진조의 공주님도 분명 LRL 대원의 뜻을 알고 기뻐했을 게 틀림없어!

1505300016.english: Is that really true? Will I be able to see the princess again?
1505300016.korean: 정말 그럴까?&n공주님을 다시 볼 수 있을까?

1505300017.english: Also… is it okay if I don't have to wait for a long time…?

1505300018.english: Of course! The two of them… no, wait, the LRL member will be able to meet everyone they like soon!
1505300018.korean: 물론이지! 두 사람… 아니지, LRL 대원이 좋아하는 모두와 금방 만날 수 있을 거야!

1505300020.english: Finally found her…! This little brat…!

1505300022.english: Kid! Do you know how much trouble I went through because of you guys!
1505300022.korean: 꼬맹이! 내가 너희 때문에 얼마나 고생했는지 알아!

1505300023.english: Ugh, I got scolded really badly by Vargr too!

1505300024.english: Huh? You're the Golden Dragon of Greed...?

1505300025.english: Because of you little brats, I ended up becoming an accomplice who helped the culprit in the warehouse raid!
1505300025.korean: 너희 꼬맹이들 때문에 내가 창고 습격 사건 범인을 도운 공범자가 됐잖아!

1505300027.english: There wasn't a single speck of gold in the warehouse! How dare you deceive me!
1505300027.korean: 창고에는 황금이 조금도 없었다고!&n감히 날 속였겠다!

1505300028.english: Ugh... We clearly only said that there might be gold...
1505300028.korean: 아으… 우리는 분명 황금이 있을지도 모른다고만 말했는데…

1505300029.english: Wait, hold on! Both of you, calm down for a moment.
1505300029.korean: 잠, 잠깐! 두 사람 모두 일단은 좀 진정해.

1505300030.english: I don't know what's going on, but fighting isn't good.
1505300030.korean: 무슨 일인지는 모르겠지만, 싸움은 좋지 않아.

1505300032.english: You asked the right question! My name is Nu… no, Nu-Nu… was it? Or Neo…?
1505300032.korean: 잘 물어봐 주었어! 내 이름은 뉴… 아니 뉴-뉴… 였나? 아니면 네오…?

1505300033.english: Anyway, it's Triaina! The best deep-sea adventurer!

1505300034.english: You're Fafnir, aren't you? I've heard the rumors quite a bit. I heard you rammed a giant airship into the Iron Tower?
1505300034.korean: 너는 파프니르지? 소문은 익히 들어서 알고 있어.&n거대한 비행선을 철의 탑에 들이받았다며?

1505300035.english: I investigated the pit that formed after that, and it was really massive!
1505300035.korean: 그 뒤로 생긴 구덩이를 조사해 봤었는데 정말 엄청나더라!

1505300036.english: There was lots of gold around...

1505300037.english: Oh!? Wait, what's wrong? Why do you look like you're about to cry?
1505300037.korean: 오우!? 잠깐, 왜 그래? 왜 울상이 된 거야?

1505300038.english: Ugh... It's nothing... It just suddenly came to mind...
1505300038.korean: 우으… 아무것도 아니야… 그냥 갑자기 생각나서 그래…

1505300039.english: I'm okay now. Because I've found a more precious treasure.
1505300039.korean: 지금은 괜찮아.&n나에게는 더 소중한 보물이 생겼으니까.

1505300040.english: I see... So you came here looking for an LRL member?
1505300040.korean: 그렇구나… 그래서 여기에는 LRL 대원을 찾으러 온 거야?

1505300041.english: Huh? That's not it. I happened to find you while passing by and just struck up a conversation…
1505300041.korean: 응? 그건 아니야.&n지나가다가 우연히 찾아서 그냥 말을 걸어본…

1505300043.english: What's wrong all of a sudden?

1505300044.english: This isn't the time to be doing this…! If I don't run away quickly!
1505300044.korean: 이러고 있을 때가 아니었어…! 빨리 도망치지 않으면!

1505300046.english: Come out, Babonir, while I'm speaking nicely!

1505300047.english: Aaaargh! You've already chased me all the way here? If I don't hide somewhere...
1505300047.korean: 이이이이익! 벌써 여기까지 쫒아 왔잖아?&n어디에 숨지 않으면…

1505300048.english: Huh...? That transport ship's cargo hold is open, isn't it?
1505300048.korean: 응…? 저 수송선 화물칸이 열려 있잖아?

1505300049.english: For now, I'll hide over there…

1505300051.english: Huh? What's wrong? Why are you staring at us like that?
1505300051.korean: 응? 왜 그래? 우리를 그렇게 빤히 보고?

1505300052.english: For some reason, I have a bad feeling...

1505300053.english: You guys follow me! They might tell them I'm hiding here!
1505300053.korean: 너희들도 따라와!&n쟤들에게 내가 여기에 숨었다고 이를지도 모르니까!

1505300055.english: W-wait!? If you suddenly pull me, whoaah!?

1505400001.english: Midgard, a free world filled with the blessings of the earth.
1505400001.korean: 자유롭고 대지의 축복이 가득한 세계, 미드가르드.

1505400002.english: Humans achieved great prosperity on this land full of abundance.
1505400002.korean: 풍요로움이 가득한 이 대지에서 인간들은 큰 번영을 이루었다.

1505400003.english: Humans have achieved more than any other race in Midgard on this blessed land.
1505400003.korean: 인간들은 축복받은 대지에서 미드가르드의 그 어떤 종족들보다 수많은 업적을 쌓아 올렸고.

1505400004.english: People highly praised and sang about the achievements they had accomplished.
1505400004.korean: 사람들은 자신들이 일궈낸 업적들을 드높게 찬양하고 노래했다.

1505400005.english: As the foremost race of Midgard and the masters of the blessed land, they believed that the glorious prosperity of mankind would continue forever.
1505400005.korean: 미드가르드 제일의 종족으로서 그리고 축복받은 대지의 주인으로서, 인간의 영광스러운 번영이 영원히 계속되리라 믿었다.

1505400007.english: It did not take long for the glory that was believed to last forever to be shattered into pieces.
1505400007.korean: 영원히 계속되리라 믿었던 영광이 산산이 부서지는 데에는, 그리 오래 걸리지 않았다.

1505400008.english: The achievements built by humans amidst the blessings of the earth are…
1505400008.korean: 대지의 축복 속에 인간들이 쌓아 올린 업적들은…

1505400009.english: With the appearance of certain beings, it burst into flames in an instant and everything turned to ashes.
1505400009.korean: 어떤 존재들의 등장으로 한순간에 불타올라 모두 잿더미가 되었다.

1505400010.english: A being that crossed the boundary from a world other than Midgard…
1505400010.korean: 미드가르드가 아닌 다른 세계에서 경계를 넘어온 존재…

1505400012.english: The appearance of the evil dragon was, for humans, a disaster sent down from the heavens itself.
1505400012.korean: 악룡의 등장은 인간들에게 있어서 하늘로부터 내려온 재앙 그 자체였다.

1505400013.english: The evil dragon mercilessly attacked humans, and the land full of abundance and blessings turned into a land burning red.
1505400013.korean: 악룡은 무자비하게 인간들을 공격했고, 풍요와 축복이 가득한 대지는 붉게 타오르는 대지로 뒤바뀌었다.

1505400014.english: The humans joined forces to counterattack the evil dragons, but they were helpless against the overwhelming difference in power.
1505400014.korean: 인간들은 힘을 모아 악룡들에게 반격했지만, 압도적인 힘의 차이에 속수무책으로 당할 수밖에 없었다.

1505400015.english: Thus, the brilliant glory of humanity was destined to become one of Midgard's histories and fade into the depths of memory.
1505400015.korean: 그렇게 인간들의 찬란한 영광은, 미드가르드의 역사 중 하나가 되어 기억의 저편으로 사라질 운명에 처했다.

1505400016.english: However, that fate of despair... was saved by a ray of hope that suddenly appeared.
1505400016.korean: 하지만, 그 절망의 운명은... 돌연히 나타난 한 줄기의 희망에 의해 구원을 받았다.

1505400017.english: A child who rose up to protect Midgard from the evil dragon.
1505400017.korean: 악룡으로부터 미드가르드를 지키기 위해 일어선 한 명의 아이.

1505400018.english: Looking at the burning land, the child vowed to restore Midgard to its former beauty with her own hands.
1505400018.korean: 아이는 불타오르는 대지를 보며, 자신의 손으로 미드가르드를 원래의 아름다웠던 모습으로 되돌리겠다고 다짐했다.

1505400019.english: And the child slayed countless evil dragons and gave hope to many people.
1505400019.korean: 그리고 아이는 수많은 악룡들을 처단하였고, 많은 사람에게 희망을 안겨주었다.

1505400020.english: Watching the child defeat the evil dragon, everyone called it this.
1505400020.korean: 사람들은 악룡을 쓰러트리는 아이의 모습을 보며 모두가 이렇게 불렀다.

1505500001.english: ...Thus, the Dragon Slayer and I, the Princess of the True Ancestors, joined forces to defeat the last evil dragon!
1505500001.korean: ...이리하여 용살자와 진조의 공주인 짐이 서로 힘을 합쳐 마지막 악룡을 쓰러트린 것이다!

1505500002.english: H-hmm... Well, it was a predictable plot, but it was a story worth listening to...
1505500002.korean: 흐, 흐응…&n뭐, 뻔한 전개이지만 나름 들을만한 이야기였네…

1505500003.english: The Princess of Jinjo might be a little cool...

1505500004.english: Th-that's right! Isn't it really cool!? I think so too!
1505500004.korean: 그, 그렇지! 정말 멋지지!?&n나도 그렇게 생각해!

1505500005.english: So? What happened next? It's absolutely NOT that I'm curious about what happens next or anything, I'm just... a tiny bit curious, I guess...?
1505500005.korean: 그래서? 그 다음은 어떻게 된 건데?&n다음 내용이 궁금하다거나 그런 건 절~대 아니고 그냥 아주 조~금 신경쓰인달까…?

1505500006.english: Hahaha, if that is so you want, I have no choice! I will recall my memories of my past life and let you know!
1505500006.korean: 후후, 그렇게 원한다면 어쩔 수 없구나!&n짐이 다시 전생의 기억을 떠올려 알려주겠느니라!

1505500007.english: I'm telling you, I'm not that curious! Well... I'll listen if you tell me, but...
1505500007.korean: 그러니까, 그렇게 궁금한건 아니라니까!&n뭐… 알려주면 듣기는 하겠지만…

1505500009.english: These two might actually be a better match than you think?
1505500009.korean: 이 두 사람, 생각보다 잘 어울릴지도?

1505500010.english: With similar hairstyles and colors, they really feel like close sisters.
1505500010.korean: 머리 스타일이나 색도 비슷한 게, 꼭 친한 자매 같은 느낌이네.

1505500012.english: How long on earth do I have to stay in this cargo hold…
1505500012.korean: 대체 언제까지 이 화물칸에 있어야 하는 거야…

1505500013.english: As soon as I got into the cargo hold, it drove off without giving me a chance to get out again, so I ended up following it all the way to Caracas…
1505500013.korean: 화물칸에 들어가자 마자 다시 나갈 새도 없이 출발해 버려서, 결국은 카라카스까지 따라와 버렸는데…

1505500014.english: Since I followed along secretly, it feels a bit awkward to suddenly go outside...
1505500014.korean: 몰래 따라온 입장이라 갑자기 밖에 나가기도 좀 그렇단 말이지…

1505500015.english: Ugh... I'm sorry about that... I didn't know it was a transport ship scheduled to depart soon...
1505500015.korean: 으… 그건 미안하다니까...&n곧 출발 예정이었던 수송선인지 몰랐단 말이야…

1505500016.english: am fine! I am actually glad to be able to talk a lot with the Golden Dragon of Greed!
1505500016.korean: 짐은 괜찮으니라!&n탐욕의 황금용과 많이 이야기할 수 있어서 오히려 즐겁도다!

1505500017.english: … Did you say she was the Princess of the True Ancestors?

1505500018.english: Hmm! I am none other than the Princess of the True Ancestors!

1505500019.english: I liked it! Don't you want to become my treasure starting today?
1505500019.korean: 마음에 들었어! 오늘부터 내 보물이 될 생각은 없어?

1505500021.english: Right, treasure! Just so you know, the Commander is my treasure too!

1505500022.english: Ah, you mean my retainers too?

1505500023.english: Uh... my familiar is the treasure of the Golden Dragon of Greed... and if I become a treasure too... that means I will become the exact same treasure as my familiar...
1505500023.korean: 어… 짐의 권속이 탐욕의 황금용의 보물이고… 짐도 보물이 되면… 권속과 똑같은 보물이 된다는 거고…

1505500025.english: … I don’t know for sure, but I understand!

1505500027.english: Hmm... I'm not sure if this is okay... For some reason, I have a feeling something huge is going to happen soon...
1505500027.korean: 으음… 이거 괜찮은지 몰라… 왠지 조만간 엄청난 일이 일어날 것 같은 예감이…

1505500028.english: Ah! Both of you, hide quickly! Someone looks like they're trying to get into the cargo hold!
1505500028.korean: 앗! 두 사람 다 빨리 숨어! 누가 화물칸에 들어오려나 봐!

1505500029.english: Hurry! We need to use the medicine before the poison spreads completely throughout this area! If any team members haven't received it yet, pass it on quickly!
1505500029.korean: 서둘러! 이 일대에 독이 완전히 퍼지기 전에 약을 사용해야 해!&n아직 받지 못한 대원이 있으면 빠르게 전달 해줘!

1505500030.english: Was it Nidhogg? Spreading poison across all of Caracas... that's insane...
1505500030.korean: 니드호그라고 했나? 카라카스 전체에 독을 뿌리다니 제정신이 아니야…

1505500031.english: According to the information, it seems there are some unfamiliar bioroid units among the enemies.
1505500031.korean: 정보에 의하면 적 중에 처음 보는 바이오로이드 개체도 있는 것 같아.

1505500032.english: I heard that the Horde forces and Bismarck's Dragon Slayers are facing them; I wonder if they'll be okay...
1505500032.korean: 호드 부대와 그 비스마르크의 드래곤 슬레이어 분들이 상대하고 있다고 들었는데 괜찮을지…

1505500033.english: Anyway, our job is to distribute this medicine to the squad members as much as possible! Let's hurry!
1505500033.korean: 아무튼, 우리의 일은 최대한 이 약을 대원들에게 나눠 주는 거야! 서두르자!

1505500034.english: Poison? A Bioroid I've never seen before? Are you saying the Orca members are fighting an enemy named Nidhogg? Right here?
1505500034.korean: 독? 처음 보는 바이오로이드?&n니드호그라는 적을 상대로 오르카 대원들이 싸우고 있다는 거야? 지금 이곳에서?

1505500035.english: This box over here is full of things that look like medicine. Is this the medicine they were just talking about?
1505500035.korean: 여기 상자 안에서 약처럼 보이는 게 가득 있는데.&n이게 방금 쟤들이 말한 그 약인가?

1505500036.english: Wait, then that means poison is really spreading around here, doesn't it?
1505500036.korean: 잠깐, 그렇다면 정말로 이 주변에 독이 퍼지고 있다는 거잖아?

1505500037.english: Just in case, let's use it right away too!
1505500037.korean: 혹시 모르니까 일단 우리도 어서 사용하자!

1505500038.english: Nidhogg… The name of the most fearsome evil dragon appearing in Dragon Slayer…
1505500038.korean: 니드호그… 드래곤 슬레이어에서 등장하는 최흉의 악룡의 이름…

1505500040.english: Are you worried about that princess named Cyclops Princess?

1505500044.english: That's obvious! What else could it be but going to meet the Jinjo Princess?
1505500044.korean: 그거야 뻔하지!&n진조의 공주님을 만나러 가는 거 말고 뭐가 있겠어?

1505500045.english: B-but... the princess is in danger, so... I told you to wait...

1505500046.english: The story you just told me... the last evil dragon that appeared in it is the guy everyone is fighting right now, Nighogg, right?
1505500046.korean: 방금 네가 알려준 이야기…&n거기서 나온 마지막 악룡이 지금 모두가 싸우고 있는 니그호그라는 녀석이지?

1505500048.english: According to the story, we barely managed to defeat him by joining forces with the Dragon Slayer. But now, neither the Dragon Slayer nor the Commander are here, are they?
1505500048.korean: 이야기대로라면 용살자와 함께 힘을 합쳐 겨우 쓰러트렸다고 했는데.&n하지만 지금은 용살자도 사령관도 없잖아?

1505500049.english: In that case, shouldn't someone awaken the power of the True Ancestor's Princess on her behalf? What do you want to do?
1505500049.korean: 그렇다면 누군가 대신해서 진조의 공주에게 힘을 일깨워줘야 하지 않겠어?&n너는 어떻게 하고 싶어?

1505500050.english: I… I want the princess to win!

1505500051.english: I hope you come back safely and be with me again!
1505500051.korean: 무사히 돌아와서 다시 나와 함께 있어줬으면 해!

1505500052.english: ...You know, I always make sure to protect what I consider precious.
1505500052.korean: ...나는 말이야 내가 소중하다고 생각하는 걸 반드시 지켜.

1505500053.korean: 그리고 나는 내 보물을 소중하게 생각하지.

1505500054.english: But you're my treasure, aren't you?

1505500055.english: In that case, I wouldn't need a reason to protect what my treasure cherishes, right?
1505500055.korean: 그렇다면 내 보물이 소중하게 생각하는 걸 지키는데 이유는 필요 없겠지?

1505500056.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like the conversation wrapped up well.
1505500056.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 어떻게 잘 이야기가 마무리된 모양이네.

1505500057.english: Alright! Then I, as an adventurer, can't possibly miss out!
1505500057.korean: 좋아! 그렇다면 모험가인 내가 빠질 수야 없지!

1505500058.english: Right here and now, we are forming the Caracas Adventure Corps to save those in danger!
1505500058.korean: 지금, 이 자리에서 위험에 빠진 이들을 구하기 위해 카라카스 모험단 결성이야!

1505600001.english: ...I will never let go of this hand.
1505600001.korean: ...나는 절대로 이 손을 놓지 않을 거야.

1505600002.english: The dragon slayer's adventure continued to protect Midgard from the evil dragon.
1505600002.korean: 악룡으로부터 미드가르드를 지키기 위해 용살자의 모험은 계속 되었다.

1505600003.english: A giant ice dragon that had crossed over from a parallel world of another dimension asked the dragon slayer.
1505600003.korean: 다른 차원의 평행 세계로부터 넘어온 거대한 얼음의 용은 용살자에게 물었다.

1505600004.english: [Child with a will stronger than anyone else, I see the earnest wish residing in your determined eyes.]
1505600004.korean: [누구보다 강한 의지를 지닌 아이야, 그대의 결연한 눈동자에 깃든 간절한 소망이 보이는구나.]

1505600005.english: [Reach out your hand, and I will help you fulfill that wish.]
1505600005.korean: [손을 내밀 거라, 그대가 그 소망을 이룰 수 있도록 도와주겠다.]

1505600006.english: [Will you make a pact with me and protect Midgard together from the evil dragons?]
1505600006.korean: [나와 계약하여 함께 악룡들로부터 미드가르드를 수호하지 않겠느냐?]

1505600007.english: My dear friend, you possess a will stronger than anyone else's.
1505600007.korean: [나의 맹우여, 그대는 누구보다 강한 의지를 가지고 있다.]

1505600008.english: [But somewhere deep inside your heart, you are always trying to fight alone…]
1505600008.korean: [하지만 그대는 언제나 마음 속 어딘가에서 홀로 싸우려고 하는 구나…]

1505600009.english: A will stronger than anyone else's, on the other hand, makes oneself lonely.
1505600009.korean: [누구보다 강한 의지는 다른 한편으로는 자신을 고독하게 만든단다.]

1505600010.english: Someday, someone will appear who will surpass your strong will and fill the emptiness in your heart.
1505600010.korean: [언젠가, 그대의 그 강한 의지를 넘어 마음의 빈 자리를 채워 줄 인물이 나타날 거다.]

1505600011.english: At the red castle beyond the misty lake, the princess of the True Ancestors, known only through legend, spoke to the dragon slayer.
1505600011.korean: 안개가 낀 호수 저편의 붉은 고성, 그곳에서 전설로만 전해내려온 진조의 공주는 용살자에게 말했다.

1505600012.english: [So you are the dragon slayer of the rumors.]

1505600013.english: [Indeed, just like the weight, I sense a power that is not of this world.]
1505600013.korean: [과연, 짐과 마찬가지로 이 세상의 것이 아닌 힘이 느껴진다.]

1505600014.english: [Very well, I have decided. Become my servant!]

1505600015.english: [W-What!? You're refusing!? Argh! I won't ask for your opinion! This is my decision!!]
1505600015.korean: [뭐, 뭣!? 거절한다고!? 에에잇! 네 녀석의 의사 따위는 묻지 않겠다! 이건 짐의 결정이니라!!]

1505600017.english: [Did you try to save the luggage for such a trivial matter…]
1505600017.korean: [그런 별 것도 아닌 일로 짐을 구하려고 한 것이냐…]

1505600018.english: […Thank you. Ahem! It’s nothing! As expected, you shall become my familiar! I say it again, your will is of no use! This is my decision!!]
1505600018.korean: […고맙다. 크흠! 아무것도 아니다! 역시 네 녀석은 짐의 권속이 되거라!&n다시 말하지만 네 녀석의 의사 따위는 필요 없다! 이건 짐의 결정이니라!!]

1505600019.english: The great Harpy King who ruled the highest mountain range in Midgard mocked the dragon slayer.
1505600019.korean: 미드가르드에서 가장 높은 산맥을 지배하는 위대한 하피의 왕은 용살자를 비웃었다.

1505600020.english: [A giant ice dragon, a cocky-looking kid, and an ordinary human? Hahaha, that's quite an interesting combination.]
1505600020.korean: [거대한 얼음의 용, 건방져 보이는 꼬맹이 그리고 평범한 인간?&n하하하, 이거 참 재미있는 조합이네.]

1505600021.english: [I am the great Harpy King who rules this place. I am sorry, but your adventure ends here.]
1505600021.korean: [짐은 이곳을 지배하는 위대한 하피의 왕.&n미안하지만 너희들의 모험은 여기까지야.]

1505600022.english: [I have a reason not to let you pass through here.]
1505600022.korean: [사정이 있어서 너희들을 여기서 지나가게 할 수 없거든.]

1505600023.english: [I have a mission, too! Because that is my responsibility as the king who leads the Harpies!]
1505600023.korean: [나에게도 사명이 있다! 그게 하피들을 통솔하는 왕으로서의 책임이니까!]

1505600024.english: [I will do anything to protect everyone! There is no time to hesitate!]
1505600024.korean: [모두들 지키기 위해서라면 나는 무슨 짓이라도 할 거다! 망설일 여유 따윈 없어!]

1505600025.english: [Hahaha, I'm so glad I met you guys. Wait, Big Sister! The atmosphere is so good, you shouldn't be bringing that up right now!]
1505600025.korean: [하하핫, 너희들을 만나서 정말 다행이야.&n잠깐, 누님! 좋은 분위기인데 여기서 그 말을 꺼내는 건 아니잖수!]

1505600026.english: Your sense of justice opened my eyes. Thank you so much, friend.
1505600026.korean: [너의 정의가 내 눈을 뜨게 해줬어. 정말 고마워, 친구.]

1505600027.english: The last remaining most fearsome evil dragon could not understand the dragon slayer.
1505600027.korean: 마지막 남은 최흉의 악룡은 용살자를 이해할 수 없었다.

1505600028.english: [Why are you still moving? Why are you still struggling?]
1505600028.korean: [어째서 아직 움직이지? 어째서 계속 발버둥을 치는 거냐?]

1505600029.english: [Your comrades have already fallen into deep darkness. There is no way to escape from here.]
1505600029.korean: [네 녀석의 동료들을 이미 짙은 어둠 속에 빠졌다. 이곳에서 벗어나는 방법은 없다.]

1505600030.english: [Why don't you understand that a life that is already over is only at peace if you just give up?]
1505600030.korean: [이미 끝나버린 목숨, 그만 포기하는 것이 편해지는 유일한 길이라는 걸 왜 모르는 거냐.]

1505600031.english: [Hahaha! Very well, Dragon Slayer! Then I shall devour even your light!]
1505600031.korean: [크하하하! 좋다, 용살자여! 그렇다면 너의 그 빛 조차 집어 삼켜주마!]

1505600032.english: ...I will never let go of this hand.
1505600032.korean: ...나는 절대로 이 손을 놓지 않을 거야.

1505600033.english: So… please keep holding my hand too.
1505600033.korean: 그러니까… 너도 내 손을 계속 잡고 있어줘.

1505600034.english: She speaks to the dragon slayer.

1505600035.english: [Of course. Forever, until the very end of this world…]

1505700003.english: It was a baseless fear, Leona. To think I would meet you in a place like this.
1505700003.korean: 기우로군, 레오나.&n그대를 이런 곳에서 만날 줄이야.

1505700004.english: The same goes for me. Looks like you come here often?
1505700004.korean: 그건 나도 마찬가지야.&n여기에 자주 오나 봐?

1505700005.english: No, today is my first time. I don't know why, but my subordinates kept nagging me to go here... Leona, what about you?
1505700005.korean: 아니, 오늘이 처음이다.&n이유는 모르겠지만 부하들이 하도 여기를 가보라고 야단을 치더군... 레오나 그대는?

1505700006.english: Me too. My younger siblings highly recommended that I visit, so I came.

1505700013.english: It looks like our gathering here wasn't a coincidence.
1505700013.korean: 아무래도 우리가 여기에 모인 건 우연이 아닌 모양이군.

1505700014.korean: 그럼 누가 우리를 여기로 불러 모았다는 거야?

1505700015.english: Who would do such a thing…

1505700016.english: Hahaha, hahahaha! Alright, everyone's here! I've been waiting!
1505700016.korean: 후후훗, 하하하핫! 좋아, 다들 모였군! 기다리고 있었다!

1505700017.english: I am Arsenal, the assistant manager of CAFE amor!

1505700020.english: I think that would be good. I have a bad feeling about this.
1505700020.korean: 그게 좋을 것 같네요.&n안 좋은 예감이 들어요.

1505700021.english: Hahaha! You two are sharp again today! There's really no need to rush back like that!
1505700021.korean: 하하하핫! 두 사람, 오늘도 날카롭군!&n그렇게 성급하게 돌아갈 필요는 없지 않나!

1505700022.english: Arsenal Captain, did you call us together?
1505700022.korean: 아스널 대장, 그대가 우리를 불러모은 건가?

1505700023.english: Hahaha, that's right. I thought a gathering like this wouldn't be bad once in a while. I also have something to tell you guys.
1505700023.korean: 후후후, 그렇다. 가끔은 이런 모임도 나쁘지 않을 거라 생각했지.&n그대들에게 할 말도 있고.

1505700025.english: Now, now, as I said before, let's not rush. We have plenty of time.
1505700025.korean: 자자, 앞서 말했지만 성급해지지는 말자고.&n시간은 많으니까 말이야.

1505700031.english: Oh, good, good! Everyone has changed!

1505700032.english: Seeing the cute faces of the top beauties in Orca makes me really excited!
1505700032.korean: 오르카에서도 손꼽히는 미녀들의 귀여운 모습을 보니, 나도 정말 흥분되는군!

1505700033.english: It's a shame it's not a bunny girl outfit, but after all, the most beautiful clothes are the ones that suit you best!
1505700033.korean: 바니걸 복장이 아닌 건 아쉽지만, 역시 자신에게 어울리는 옷이 가장 아름다운 법이지!

1505700034.english: Should I call the city guard?

1505700036.english: Hahaha! You two are still merciless!
1505700036.korean: 하하하핫! 두 사람은 여전히 자비가 없군!

1505700037.english: Arsenal captain, are you okay for a moment?

1505700038.english: Leaving aside why our clothes are displayed here
1505700038.korean: 어째서 우리 옷이 이곳에 비치되어 있는지는 둘째치더라도

1505700039.english: What do you plan to make me do dressed like this?

1505700040.english: Hahaha, that's a strange question! Have you forgotten where this is?
1505700040.korean: 후후후, 이상한 질문을 하는군!&n이곳이 어디인지 잊었나?

1505700041.english: Now that the time is right, shall we get started?
1505700041.korean: 마침 시간이 됐으니, 슬슬 시작해 볼까!

1505700044.english: CAFE amor Daily Special Guest Event Opens!
1505700044.korean: CAFE amor 일일 특별 게스트 이벤트 영업 개시다!

1505800001.english: Thanks for coming today! Come visit again next time!
1505800001.korean: 오늘은 와줘서 고맙다! 다음에 또 놀러 오도록!

1505800002.english: Was that the last customer? Hehe, I expected it, but I never imagined it would go this well.
1505800002.korean: 방금이 마지막 손님인가?&n후후, 예상은 했지만 설마 이 정도로 잘될 줄은 몰랐군.

1505800003.english: I'm glad my suggestion to the Commander paid off. Great job everyone today!
1505800003.korean: 사령관에게 제안한 보람이 있어서 다행이야.&n다들 오늘은 수고 많았다!

1505800004.english: Ugh, today is really the worst day.

1505800005.english: Leaving physical fatigue aside, the mental fatigue... What on earth have I done so shamefully...
1505800005.korean: 몸의 피로는 둘째치고 정신적 피로가…&n나는 대체 무슨 부끄러운 짓을…

1505800006.english: I have no aversion to the act of providing services, but…

1505800007.english: Serving you like this... hmm... I guess I am embarrassed.
1505800007.korean: 이런 모습으로 대접하는 건, 으음... 역시 부끄럽군.

1505800008.english: It might have been overwhelming for the two of them. Though it is something I am used to.
1505800008.korean: 두 사람에게는 버거웠을지도 모르겠군요.&n저야 익숙한 일이지만요.

1505800009.english: Anyway, I unintentionally ended up serving many people, but...
1505800009.korean: 그건 그렇고, 본의 아니게 많은 분께 봉사를 해드리게 되었습니다만…

1505800010.english: Arsenal? You just called yourself the Commander; are you, Master, involved in this matter?
1505800010.korean: 아스널? 방금 사령관이라 하셨는데, 주인님께서 이번 일을?

1505800011.english: No, I was the one who proposed it. The Commander merely granted permission.
1505800011.korean: 아니, 제안한 건 어디까지나 나다.&n사령관은 그저 허가를 해줬을 뿐이지.

1505800012.english: For your information, the commander brought everyone's clothes, so rest assured.
1505800012.korean: 참고로 모두의 옷을 가져다준 건 사령관이니 안심하도록.

1505800013.english: … You clearly said you had something to tell us, didn't you? Go ahead and say it. For what reason did you call us and make us work at the cafe?
1505800013.korean: …분명 저희에게 할 말이 있다고 했죠?&n말해보세요. 무슨 이유로 우리를 부르고 카페 일을 시킨 거죠?

1505800015.english: Of course it's because it looks like it'll be fun!

1505800017.english: Hahaha, the three of you are glaring at me. Just kidding.

1505800018.english: Of course, my opinion that it looks like it will be fun hasn't changed!
1505800018.korean: 물론 재미있을 것 같다는 생각은 변함이 없지만!

1505800020.english: The reason I called these three people today is that I thought a change of pace might be necessary at this point.
1505800020.korean: 내가 오늘 이렇게 세 사람을 부른 이유는, 이쯤에서 기분 전환이 필요하지 않을까 생각해서다.

1505800021.english: And it is a kind of rebuke I am giving you.
1505800021.korean: 그리고 내가 그대들에게 내리는 일종의 꾸짖음이지.

1505800023.english: For what reason? Don't you mean... do you want to talk about what happened on the Northern Front?
1505800023.korean: 무슨 이유로?&n설마… 북부 전선에서 있었던 일을 말하고 싶은 거야?

1505800024.english: Captain Arsenal, all three of us deeply feel what happened on the Northern Front.
1505800024.korean: 아스널 대장, 북부 전선에서 있었던 일은 우리 세 사람 모두 통감하고 있다.

1505800025.english: Even though there were three commanders, instead of protecting the commander, we put him in danger, and shamefully, we even received help... I have nothing to say about this fact.
1505800025.korean: 대장이 셋이나 있었음에도 사령관을 지키지 못할망정 위험에 빠트리고,&n부끄럽게도 도움을 받았지… 이 사실에는 나도 할 말이 없다.

1505800026.english: And wouldn't Captain Lilith's bodyguard feel that guilt more acutely than anyone else?
1505800026.korean: 그리고 그 죄책감은 누구보다 리리스 경호 대장이 뼈저리게 느끼고 있지 않겠나?

1505800028.english: You're mistaken. What I'm talking about isn't what happened on the Northern Front.
1505800028.korean: 뭔가 착각하고 있군.&n내가 말하고 싶은 건 북부 전선에서 있었던 일이 아니다.

1505800029.english: Would I have been any different? No matter how faithful I was to my desires, I wouldn't have been able to do anything in that situation either.
1505800029.korean: 나라고 해서 달랐겠나?&n아무리 욕망에 충실하다고 한들 그런 상황이라면 나 역시 별수 없었겠지.

1505800031.english: The part where I want to scold the three people is what happened after they returned to Orca.
1505800031.korean: 내가 세 사람을 꾸짖고 싶은 부분은 오르카로 돌아온 이후의 일이다.

1505800032.english: Has any of you had a proper conversation with the Commander since returning to Orca?
1505800032.korean: 그대들 중 오르카로 돌아오고 나서 사령관과 제대로 이야기를 나눈 사람이 있나?

1505800034.english: As expected, there is no one here.

1505800035.english: It is truly lamentable! Everyone was so faithful to their desires just to be with the Commander.
1505800035.korean: 통탄할 일이 아닐 수 없어!&n그렇게 다들 사령관과 함께 있기 위해 욕망에 충실했는데 말이야.

1505800036.english: What is everyone so afraid of?

1505800037.english: Everyone knows that the commander isn't the type to care much about such things, right?
1505800037.korean: 사령관이 그런 일을 크게 신경 쓰지 않는 사람이라는 건 다들 잘 알고 있지 않나.

1505800038.english: If you keep holding onto this indefinitely, it will hinder your future endeavors. After all, you are the leaders who must guide everyone.
1505800038.korean: 언제까지고 마음에 담아두다간 앞으로의 일들에 지장이 생길 거다.&n그대들은 모두를 이끌어야 하는 대장이니까.

1505800040.english: Well, I am well aware that saying this won't solve the problem immediately.
1505800040.korean: 뭐, 이렇게 말해도 바로 해결될 일이 아니라는 것쯤은 나도 잘 알고 있다.

1505800041.english: I suppose the best way is to meet the person directly.
1505800041.korean: 역시 제일 좋은 방법은 당사자와 직접 대면하는 거겠지.

1505800043.english: Th-that's…! The 'Commander Daily Pass' that's only issued during really special events!? And four of them?
1505800043.korean: 그, 그건…! 정말 특별한 이벤트 때만 발급한다는 '사령관 일일 자유이용권'!?&n그것도 4장이나?

1505800044.english: I'll give one to everyone! This is your pay for today's work! Just so you know, one is mine!
1505800044.korean: 모두에게는 이걸 한 장씩 주도록 하지!&n오늘 일한 만큼의 급료다! 참고로 한 장은 내 거다!

1505800045.english: Feel free to use this, whether you use it yourself or transfer it to someone else. For your information, the moment I use it, I plan to deprive the Commander of his physical freedom and never leave the room!
1505800045.korean: 이걸 사용하든 다른 사람에게 양도하든 자유롭게 쓰도록.&n참고로 나는 사용하는 즉시 사령관의 신체의 자유를 빼앗고 방에서 나오지 않을 계획이다!

1505800046.english: Hehe, what? You're not seriously expecting us to cheer up with something like that, are you?
1505800046.korean: 흐흥, 뭐야? 설마 그런 걸로 우리 보고 기분을 풀라는 거야?

1505800047.english: Oh? I guess Miss Leona isn't needed? Then I'll take her share instead.
1505800047.korean: 어머? 레오나 양은 필요 없나 보죠?&n그럼 제가 레오나 양의 몫까지 대신 받아 가도록 할게요.

1505800048.english: Wait! I didn't say I didn't need it!

1505800049.english: I… am not without a need…

1505800050.english: Hahaha! Hmm, as expected, being honest with your desires is the fastest way!
1505800050.korean: 하하하!&n음, 역시 자신의 욕망에 솔직해지는 게 가장 빠른 방법이지!

1505800051.english: A few days later, an incident occurred in Orca where the commander was absent for four consecutive days.
1505800051.korean: 며칠 뒤, 오르카에서 사령관이 4일 연속으로 자리를 비우는 일이 발생했다.

1505800052.english: And after four days, the commander returned looking haggard for some reason, and according to rumors, the four captains of Orca were more energetic than usual.
1505800052.korean: 그리고 4일이 지나 사령관은 어째서인지 핼쑥해진 상태로 복귀하였고,&n소문에 의하면 오르카의 대장 넷은 여느 때보다 기운이 넘쳤다고 한다.

1505900001.english: What is your name and affiliation?

1505900003.english: Nothing will be solved just by keeping your mouth shut.
1505900003.korean: 입 다문다고 해서 아무것도 해결되지 않아요.

1505900004.english: I'll ask you one more time. What is your name and affiliation?
1505900004.korean: 다시 한번 물어볼게요.&n이름과 소속이 어떻게 되세요?

1505900005.english: Ah... so... it hasn't been that long since I joined... but I'm a member of Orca now, too...
1505900005.korean: 아… 그러니까… 제가 합류한 지 얼마 지나지는 않았지만...&n저도 이제 오르카 소속인데요…

1505900006.english: I know that, too. You must have a specific affiliation.
1505900006.korean: 그건 저도 알고 있어요.&n상세 소속이 있을 거 아니에요.

1505900007.english: Hng... My name is Rhode... I work for Poseidon Industries...

1505900009.english: Do I really have to say it?

1505900010.english: It is necessary for identity verification and contacting guardians.
1505900010.korean: 신원 조회와 보호자 연락을 위해 필요해요.

1505900011.english: Or is there something you would be uncomfortable mentioning?

1505900012.english: That's not it... *Sob*... Gam... Ah, no... I mean Lady Merope...
1505900012.korean: 그건 아닌데… 후에엥…&n감… 아, 아니… 메로페 님이요…

1505900013.english: What were you doing near the warehouse? That area is off-limits to unauthorized personnel.
1505900013.korean: 창고 근처에서 뭘 하고 계셨던 거예요?&n거기는 관계자 외 출입 금지인데요.

1505900014.english: Th-that's just because I got lost! I absolutely did not go in with any ulterior motives!
1505900014.korean: 그, 그건 단순히 길을 잃어서 그런 거예요!&n절대로 다른 불순한 의도를 가지고 들어간 건 아니에요!

1505900016.english: ...Ahem! Phew... Phew... This is the City Guard.

1505900017.english: We are currently protecting Mr. Rhode of Poseidon Industries as a missing child. If you are her guardian, please come to the City Guard.
1505900017.korean: 현재 포세이돈 인더스트리 소속의 로데 님을 미아로 보호하고 있습니다. 보호자 되시는 분은 시티 가드로 와주시기 바랍니다.

1505900018.english: We would like to inform you once again. We are currently protecting Mr. Rhode, a member of Poseidon Industries, as a missing person. As her guardian, Merope, please come to the City Guard.
1505900018.korean: 다시 한번 알려드립니다. 현재 포세이돈 인더스트리 소속의 로데 님을 미아로 보호하고 있습니다. 보호자 되시는 메로페 님, 메로페 님은 시티 가드로 와주시기 바랍니다.

1505900019.english: Ugh, ahayo ahayo... I'm sorry... Please don't grab Rhode's cheeks.
1505900019.korean: 아으, 아하요 아하요…&n재성해여… 로데의 볼 자바당기지 마라주세여.

1505900020.english: Do you know how much I've been looking for you!? You just disappeared so suddenly…! I told you so many times not to fall like that.
1505900020.korean: 얼마나 찾았는지 알아!?&n갑자기 없어져서는…! 그렇게 떨어지지 말라고 몇 번이나 말했잖아.

1505900021.english: Where on earth did you go?

1505900022.english: Well… the things around me were so fascinating that I was just looking around and… hehehe…
1505900022.korean: 그게… 주위에 있는 것들이 너무 신기해서 구경하다 그만…&n에헤헤…

1505900023.english: Anyway, Meropé! Orca is really amazing!
1505900023.korean: 그건 그렇고, 메로페 님! 오르카는 정말 대단해요!

1505900024.english: This is my first time seeing such large buildings. They are all decorated in a very fancy way.
1505900024.korean: 저 이렇게 큰 건물들이 있는 곳은 처음이에요.&n전부 뭔가 화려하게 꾸며져 있어요.

1505900025.english: I've only ever seen things like this in magazines... What on earth kind of places are these!?
1505900025.korean: 이런 건 잡지로밖에 본 적이 없는데…&n대체 뭐 하는 곳들일까요!?

1505900026.english: Ugh, you're going to get lost again at this rate. I understand, but please follow along for now.
1505900026.korean: 어휴, 그러다가 또 미아가 돼버리겠어.&n이해는 하지만 지금은 잘 따라와.

1505900027.english: Hehehe~ By the way, where are we going right now?
1505900027.korean: 에헤헤~&n그런데 저희 지금 어디로 가는 건가요?

1505900028.english: Merope asked me to go with her, so I followed along, but...
1505900028.korean: 메로페 님이 같이 가자고 하셔서 따라 나오기는 했는데.

1505900029.english: That’s a secret, so it’s just for the fun until you get there.

1506000001.english: Oh, you're here! I've been waiting.

1506000002.english: Mel! I'm sorry, you waited a long time, didn't you?

1506000003.english: No. We have just arrived as well.

1506000004.english: I was a bit surprised when your name came up on the City Guard broadcast, but it looks like it wasn't a big deal.
1506000004.korean: 시티 가드 방송에서 네 이름이 나왔을 때는 좀 놀랬지만,&n보아하니 큰일은 아니었나 보구나.

1506000005.english: Ahaha... Yeah, something like that happened.
1506000005.korean: 아하하… 응, 그럴 일이 좀 있었어.

1506000007.english: Sia unnie! Long time no see! I missed you!

1506000008.english: Yeah! Sia missed Merope so much, too!
1506000008.korean: 응! 시아도 메로페를 엄청 보고 싶었어!

1506000009.english: Welcome, Meropé. I've been waiting for you.

1506000010.english: Merope, I've been waiting for you! You didn't neglect your training just because I wasn't here, did you?
1506000010.korean: 메로페, 기다리고 있었어!&n내가 없다고 해서 단련을 게을리한 건 아니지?

1506000011.english: MP is here! Thea is here too! Of course, we didn't slack off! We can show you if you want!
1506000011.korean: 엠피 언니 나왔어!&n테아 언니도! 물론 게을리하지 않았지! 원한다면 보여줄 수도 있어!

1506000012.english: Hehe, I'm glad to see us all together again like this.
1506000012.korean: 후후, 이렇게 다 같이 다시 보게 돼서 기쁘네요.

1506000013.english: By the way, regarding Merope calling Thea 'sister'... could you please stop? How should I put it... the connotation is a bit off, I guess...
1506000013.korean: 그런데 메로페 그 테아 언니라는 건… 그만해주면 안 될까.&n뭐랄까 어감이 좀 그렇달까…

1506000014.english: Excuse me, Merope… who are these people…?

1506000015.english: Oh, sorry, Rhode, I completely forgot. Well then, I'll introduce everyone.
1506000015.korean: 앗, 미안해 로데 깜박 잊고 있었어.&n그럼, 모두를 소개할게.

1506000016.english: They are Melite, Emphitrite, Salacia, and Galatea from the Mermaid Fleet.
1506000016.korean: 머메이드 함대 소속의 멜리테 언니, 엠피트리테 언니, 살라시아 언니 그리고 갈라테아 언니야.

1506000017.english: These are the older sisters I lived with when I was in Malta before I came to Poseidon.
1506000017.korean: 내가 포세이돈에 오기 전, 몰타에 있었을 때 함께 지내던 언니들이야.

1506000018.english: Mermaid sisters, this is Rodae, whom I mentioned before.

1506000019.english: So you are Rodero! I’ve heard a lot about you! I heard that you were close to Merope while she was in Poseidon.
1506000019.korean: 네가 로데로구나! 이야기는 많이 들었다!&n메로페가 포세이돈에 있는 동안 가깝게 지냈다고 들었다.

1506000020.english: Nice to meet you, Rhode. My name is Amphitrite. Thank you for being close with Merope.
1506000020.korean: 반가워요 로데. 저는 엠피트리테라고 해요.&n메로페와 친하게 지내줘서 고마워요.

1506000021.english: Hi! Sia is Salacia! Please call me Sia~!

1506000022.english: I'm Galatea! You said your name was Rhode, right? I see tremendous potential in you. Don't you want to train with me?
1506000022.korean: 난 갈라테아!&n로데라고 했지? 엄청난 잠재력이 보이는데, 나와 함께 단련할 생각 없어?

1506000023.english: Ah… um, um… so… uh, hello…
1506000023.korean: 아… 저, 저기… 그러니까… 안, 안녕하세요…

1506000025.english: It clearly says Mermaid right now...

1506000026.english: If it's a mermaid, it must surely be Saman Industries'…

1506000028.english: Rhode? What's wrong all of a sudden?

1506000031.english: I just said those people belong to the Mermaid Fleet...
1506000031.korean: 방금 저 분들을 머메이드 함대 소속이라고…

1506000033.english: Hiccup… If it’s Mermaid, then it’s Saman Industries’…

1506000034.english: That's right, it's the Mermaid Fleet from the Mermaid Project developed by Saman Industries.
1506000034.korean: 맞아, 삼안 산업에서 개발된 머메이드 프로젝트의 머메이드 함대야.

1506000036.english: Why have you been acting like this for a while? Is something wrong?
1506000036.korean: 아까부터 왜 그러는 건데? 문제라도 있어?

1506000037.english: Are you really asking because you don't know? The Mermaid Fleet is like a sworn enemy to our Poseidon Fleet!
1506000037.korean: 정말 몰라서 그러시는 거예요?&n머메이드 함대라면 우리 포세이돈 함대에게 있어 철천지원수 같은 함대잖아요!

1506000038.english: I never participated in the Second Coalition War, but I heard it was a fierce battle. In particular, I heard that the rumors surrounding the Mermaid Fleet Commander at the time were truly tremendous.
1506000038.korean: 저는 2차 연합 전쟁에 참여한 적은 없지만, 치열한 싸움이었다고 들었어요.&n특히 그때 들리던 머메이드 함대 전대장에 대한 소문이 정말 어마무시 했다고요.

1506000040.english: The commander of the Mermaid Fleet is a monster that rose from the deep sea.
1506000040.korean: 머메이드 함대의 전대장은 심해에서 올라온 괴물이라고요.

1506000041.english: At that time, it was an object of terror for the Allied forces, said to have led countless fleets deep into the ocean…
1506000041.korean: 그때 당시 연합군에 있어서 공포의 대상으로, 수많은 함대를 심해 깊숙한 곳으로 인도했다고…

1506000042.english: If the Mermaid Fleet has a monster like that, surely the others would be... *gulp*... If that very monster were here, I...
1506000042.korean: 그런 괴물이 있는 머메이드 함대라면 분명 다른 분들도… 꿀꺽...&n만약 그 본인이 여기에 있기라도 한다면 저는…

1506000043.english: Hoho, do you know the commander of our Mermaid Fleet?
1506000043.korean: 호오, 우리 머메이드 함대의 전대장을 알고 있는 것이냐?

1506000044.english: Waaaaah!! Please don't eat me! I don't want to go to the deep sea yet~!
1506000044.korean: 후에에엥!! 잡아먹지 말아주세요! 저는 아직 심해로 가고 싶지 않아요~!

1506000045.english: Hahaha, you don't need to be that surprised; we won't eat you.
1506000045.korean: 하하하하, 그렇게 놀라지 않아도 잡아먹거나 하지 않는다.

1506000046.english: Rest assured, the monster you spoke of rising from the deep sea is not here right now.
1506000046.korean: 안심하거라 네가 말하는 심해에서 올라온 그 괴물은 지금 여기에 없으니.

1506000047.english: The rumors about the former commander might be a bit exaggerated, but from Poseidon's perspective, it wouldn't be that different.
1506000047.korean: 전대장에 대한 소문이 살짝 과장된 감이 없지 않아 있지만, 포세이돈 입장에서 본다면 그리 다르지 않겠구나.

1506000048.english: Mermaid and Poseidon clearly aimed their cannons at each other during the past Alliance War.
1506000048.korean: 분명 머메이드와 포세이돈은 과거 연합 전쟁 때 서로 함포를 겨눈 사이다.

1506000049.english: I, too, sank quite a fleet back then... and quite a few of our mermaid sisters were sunk.
1506000049.korean: 나 역시 그때 적지 않은 함대를 침몰시켰고...&n적지 않은 우리 머메이드 자매들이 침몰됐지.

1506000051.english: However, with the appearance of the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs), we lowered the cannons we had been aiming at each other. We joined hands and fought against a single enemy called the Iron Bug.
1506000051.korean: 하지만 철충의 등장하고 우리는 서로에게 겨누던 함포를 거두었다.&n서로 손을 잡고 철충이라는 하나의 적과 맞서 싸웠지.

1506000052.english: And now, we are all colleagues belonging to Orca together.
1506000052.korean: 그리고 지금은 다 같이 오르카에 소속되어 있는 동료다.

1506000053.english: You may not be able to forget everything from the past, but isn't this enough, at least for now?
1506000053.korean: 과거의 일을 전부 잊을 수는 없겠지만, 적어도 지금만큼은 이걸로 충분하지 않겠느냐?

1506000054.english: Ah... um... thank you. And I'm sorry.

1506000055.english: It’s alright! I only did what was natural as the Queen of the Chocoland Kingdom!
1506000055.korean: 괜찮다! 초코랜드 왕국의 여왕으로서 당연한 행동을 했을 뿐이니!

1506000057.english: Hmm! The Kingdom of Chocoland is…

1506000058.english: Okay, okay, that's enough! Anything more would make this too long, so stop!
1506000058.korean: 자, 자, 거기까지!&n그 이상은 얘기가 길어지니까 스톱!

1506000059.english: We gathered today to welcome Rhode, didn't we? I finally got to show off my skills for the first time in a while!
1506000059.korean: 오늘은 로데를 환영하기 위해 모인 거잖아?&n모처럼 실력 발휘를 했다고!

1506000060.english: Rhode! Welcome! The Neri have prepared a wonderful welcome!
1506000060.korean: 로데! 어서 와!&n네리들이 멋진 환영 준비를 했어!

1506000061.english: I was wondering what on earth you were up to... but enough of the mood-killing talk! Let's get started!
1506000061.korean: 대체 뭘하고 있나 했는데…&n분위기가 떨어지는 얘기는 여기까지! 어서 시작하자~!

1506000062.english: Welcome, Mr. Rhode. Welcome to CAFE Horizon.
1506000062.korean: 어서오세요. 로데 씨.&nCAFE Horizon에 온 걸 환영해요.

1506000063.english: Huh…? Lady Merope, what on earth is this…? A welcome party?

1506000064.english: It means exactly what it says. The welcome party for Rhode joining Orca.
1506000064.korean: 말 그대로의 의미야.&n로데가 오르카에 합류한 환영회.

1506000065.english: I've prepared a delicious cake too, so you can look forward to it.

1506000067.english: Are you talking about the cake I've only ever seen in magazines?
1506000067.korean: 지금까지 잡지로만 줄곧 봐왔던 케이크 말인가요?

1506000068.english: Are you talking about that cake, a type of European pastry made by whipping or expanding flour, eggs, milk, sugar, and butter, which has a sweet and soft texture!?
1506000068.korean: 유럽식 제과류의 일종으로 밀가루, 계란, 우유, 설탕, 버터 등으로 거품을 내거나 팽창시켜 만들어 달고 부드러운 식감의 그 케이크 말인가요!?

1506000069.english: Am I finally going to be able to try the cake!?!?
1506000069.korean: 제가 마침내 케이크를 먹어 볼 수 있는 건가요!?!?

1506100004.english: As soon as Khan finished speaking, she vanished from my sight in an instant.
1506100004.korean: - 칸은 말을 마치자마자 순식간에 내 눈앞에서 사라졌다.

1506100005.english: Where are you looking, Commander! It's over here!

1506100006.english: - Ugh... Was it the right side!?

1506100009.english: Khan, who had approached quickly from the right, swung her training stick, and I blocked the attack with the stick I was holding.
1506100009.korean: - 오른쪽으로 빠르게 다가온 칸이 훈련용 봉을 휘둘렀고, 나 역시 들고 있던 봉으로 공격을 막아냈다.

1506100011.english: Khan's relentless onslaught continued without a moment's rest, and I dodged by a hair's breadth, moving to keep my posture from collapsing.
1506100011.korean: - 쉴 틈 없는 칸의 맹공이 이어졌고, 나는 종이 한 장 차이로 피하며 자세가 무너지지 않도록 움직였다.

1506100013.english: I can see Khan's attacks now, which I couldn't see at all until recently!
1506100013.korean: - 얼마 전까지만 해도 전혀 보이지 않았던 칸의 공격이 이제는 보여!

1506100016.english: Good! But you shouldn't just play defense.

1506100020.english: When I, who had only been on the defensive, started to attack for the first time, Khan looked slightly surprised, and I did not miss that opportunity and continued to attack.
1506100020.korean: - 방어만 하던 내가 처음으로 공격을 시작하자 칸은 살짝 놀란 기색을 보였고, 나는 그 틈을 놓치지 않고 계속해서 공격을 이어 나갔다.

1506100021.english: However, I only showed a moment's weakness, and Khan effortlessly dodged all of my attacks.
1506100021.korean: - 하지만 틈을 보인 건 단 한 순간뿐, 칸은 내 공격을 여유롭게 모두 피했다.

1506100022.english: My specs should be superior... Does that mean there is an overwhelming difference in combat experience and instinct?
1506100022.korean: - 스펙은 이쪽이 위일 텐데… 전투 경험과 센스에서 압도적인 차이가 있다는 건가.

1506100023.english: - Ordinary attacks cannot damage Khan. In that case…
1506100023.korean: - 평범한 공격으로는 칸에게 피해를 줄 수 없다.&n그렇다면…

1506100025.english: - To deal a blow to Khan…

1506100026.english: As soon as I stopped moving, Khan attacked as expected. This time, I neither dodged nor blocked the attack.
1506100026.korean: - 내가 움직임을 멈추자 칸은 예상대로 공격해 왔다. 이번에 나는 공격을 피하지도, 막지도 않았다.

1506100027.english: - It is simply a matter of slightly twisting the body to make the attack miss the vital spot.
1506100027.korean: - 다만 몸을 살짝 비틀어 공격이 급소를 빗나가게 할 뿐.

1506100028.english: And at the same time, I swung the staff toward Khan.
1506100028.korean: - 그리고 동시에 나는 칸을 향해 봉을 휘둘렀다.

1506100029.english: It is the so-called "giving up the flesh to gain the bone" strategy.
1506100029.korean: - 이른바 살을 주고 뼈를 취하는 작전이다.

1506100030.english: Khan's thrusting attack struck my side.
1506100030.korean: - 칸의 찌르기 공격이 내 옆구리를 타격했다.

1506100031.english: It hurts like I'm going to die... I'm going to get scolded really badly by Daphne and Lise...
1506100031.korean: - 죽을 만큼 아프다... 다프네랑 리제에게 엄청 혼나겠네…

1506100032.english: - The first person to land a blow on their opponent wins this duel. In other words, at this point, it is already over with Khan's victory, but...
1506100032.korean: - 이 대련은 먼저 상대에게 타격을 입힌 사람이 승리다.&n즉, 이 시점에서 이미 칸의 승리로 끝이지만…

1506100033.english: That's that! Training like it's the real thing! I lost the sparring match, but I won the fight!
1506100033.korean: - 그건 그거고! 훈련은 실전처럼!&n대련에서는 졌지만 싸움에서는 내 승리다!

1506100034.english: And just like that, my decisive blow struck Khan...
1506100034.korean: - 그렇게 내 회심의 일격이 칸에게 명중…

1506100036.english: At that moment, Khan dodged the attack, which she thought would be impossible to avoid, by arching her body with a movement beyond imagination.
1506100036.korean: - 그 순간, 피하는 건 불가능할 거라 생각한 공격을 칸은 상상을 초월한 움직임으로 몸을 젖혀 피했다.

1506100037.english: Then, she lifted her two long legs, covered my face, and threw me straight onto the floor.
1506100037.korean: - 그러고는 긴 두 다리를 들어 올려 내 얼굴을 감싼 뒤, 그대로 바닥에 내동댕이쳤다.

1506100038.english: - … It was a complete defeat for me, both in the sparring and in the fight…

1506100040.english: Khan applied medicine to my body with a worried expression.
1506100040.korean: - 칸은 내 몸에 약을 발라주며 걱정하는 표정을 지었다.

1506100041.english: I'm sorry... Even though it's just training, to injure the Commander...
1506100041.korean: 미안하다... 아무리 훈련이라지만, 사령관에게 상처를 입히다니…

1506100043.english: Hahaha, that's not true. The Commander has become much stronger than I thought.
1506100043.korean: 후후, 그렇지 않다.&n사령관은 내가 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 강해졌다.

1506100044.english: I don't mean to disparage the Orca members, but the current commander wouldn't lose against most of them.
1506100044.korean: 오르카 대원들을 폄하할 생각은 없지만, 지금의 사령관이라면 대부분의 대원 상대로 지지 않을 거다.

1506100045.english: Hmm, still, I went a bit too far in my delight at the Commander's rapid growth. It would have been enough to just dodge the last attack, but I ended up counterattacking.
1506100045.korean: 으음, 그래도 사령관의 빠른 성장이 기쁜 나머지 도가 지나쳤군.&n마지막 공격은 피하기만 했어도 충분했는데 그만 반격을 해버리고 말았다.

1506100047.english: Up until now, giving orders to the troops has been sufficient, but considering what happened on the northern front, there may be situations in the future where I have to go directly to the battlefield.
1506100047.korean: - 지금까지는 대원들에게 지시를 내리는 것만으로 충분했지만, 북부 전선에서 있었던 일들을 생각하면 앞으로는 직접 전장으로 나서야 하는 상황이 또 나올지도 모른다.

1506100048.english: To prepare for that time, I need to become stronger than I am now…
1506100048.korean: - 그때를 대비하려면 지금보다 더 강해져야 해…

1506100050.english: - Phew, anyway, I'm sweating like crazy... I guess it's no surprise considering how much I moved? Hurry up and take a shower... Huh?
1506100050.korean: - 후으, 그나저나 굉장한 땀이네… 그렇게 움직였으니 당연한가? 어서 샤워를… 응?

1506100053.english: Excuse me. I merely thought the Commander's body... was well-trained.
1506100053.korean: 실례했다.&n그저 사령관의 몸이... 잘 단련됐다고 생각했을 뿐이다.

1506100054.english: What is this atmosphere… Could it be that Khan just made an appeal?
1506100054.korean: - 뭐지, 이 공기는… 설마 지금 칸이 어필을 한 건가?

1506100056.english: Khan slowly reached out and touched my chest.
1506100056.korean: 칸은 천천히 손을 뻗어 내 가슴팍을 만졌다.

1506100057.english: It is incredibly big... and solid. I have no words other than excellent.
1506100057.korean: 굉장히 크고… 단단하다.&n훌륭하다고 밖에 할 말이 없군.

1506100058.english: It’s fine, I didn’t spar with you because I wanted something in particular.
1506100058.korean: 괜찮다, 딱히 뭔가를 원해서 그대와 대련을 한 게 아니니.

1506100060.english: We both sweated a lot... so... wouldn't you wash my back?
1506100060.korean: 서로 땀을 많이 흘렸으니…&n등을... 씻겨주지 않겠나?

1506100061.english: After confirming that no one was around, I set up a sign in front of the shower room saying it was being cleaned, just in case.
1506100061.korean: - 나는 주변에 아무도 없는 걸 확인한 후, 혹시 모를 상황을 위해 샤워실 앞에 청소 중이라는 간판을 세워 놓았다.

1506100069.english: I'm the one who asked for the sparring match.

1506100070.english: Besides, I was the one who asked them not to go easy on me and to treat it like a real match.
1506100070.korean: 게다가 봐주지 말고 실전처럼 해달라고 한 것도 나고.

1506100071.english: I think I was able to survive on the northern front thanks to Khan's training.
1506100071.korean: 칸의 훈련 덕분에 북부 전선에서 살아남을 수 있었다고 생각해.

1506100072.english: Honestly, I don't really feel like I've gotten that much stronger, but...

1506100074.english: Khan's legs felt soft to the touch. It was actually a reward.
1506100074.korean: 칸의 다리 감촉이 부드럽더라. 오히려 포상이었어.

1506100076.english: No, it was because she was staring at me intently…

1506100078.english: Do you want to touch it if you're interested?

1506100079.english: It's not like it's worn out or anything.

1506100082.english: You haven't given me the prize for winning the duel yet. Is there something you want?
1506100082.korean: 대련 승부에서 이긴 상을 아직 주지 않았네. 뭔가 원하는 게 있어?

1506100083.english: I want to give it to you. Because you distinguished yourself in Caracas as well.
1506100083.korean: 내가 주고 싶어서 그래. 카라카스에서도 큰 공훈을 세웠으니까.

1506100084.english: I will do as you command.

1506200002.english: - While I was looking around Orca after finishing intense training, the Cyclops Princess called out to me.
1506200002.korean: - 격한 단련을 마치고 오르카를 둘러보고 있을 때, 사이클롭스 프린세스가 나를 불렀다.

1506200003.english: With a desperate expression, as if having lost the whole world.
1506200003.korean: - 세상을 다 잃은 듯한 다급한 표정으로.

1506200005.english: - If it is 'that child' the Cyclops Princess is talking about…

1506200007.english: I grabbed the hand of the Cyclops Princess, who was hurriedly trying to leave for somewhere.
1506200007.korean: - 나는 급하게 어디론가 떠나려는 사이클롭스 프린세스의 손을 붙잡았다.

1506200008.english: Why are you doing this!? If I don't find that child as soon as possible...
1506200008.korean: 왜 그러느냐!? 짐은 한시라도 빨리 그 아이를 찾지 않으면…

1506200009.english: I hugged the excited Cyclops Princess.

1506200010.english: A dragon, a dragon slayer!? Suddenly like that... Hmm...

1506200011.english: Yes... I have calmed down. I have shown a shameful side of myself in front of you.
1506200011.korean: 그래... 진정됐다.&n그대 앞에서 부끄러운 모습을 보였도다.

1506200012.english: That child' went out to play with a friend!
1506200012.korean: 그 아이'가 친구와 함께 놀러 나갔느니라!

1506200014.english: So, I'm saying 'that kid' made a new friend and went out to play with them without Jim knowing!
1506200014.korean: 그러니까 '그 아이'가 짐이 모르는 사이 새로운 친구를 사귀어 같이 놀러 나갔단 말이다!

1506200015.english: - Hmm, an idiot... and a serious LRL idiot at that...
1506200015.korean: - 음, 바보다… 그것도 심각한 LRL 바보다…

1506200016.english: But what's the problem with that? LRL going out to play with other child bioroids has been happening all along, hasn't it?
1506200016.korean: - 그런데 그게 무슨 문제인 거지?&nLRL이 다른 어린이 바이오로이드와 같이 놀러 다니는 건 지금까지도 있었던 일인데?

1506200017.english: Yeah, Jim thinks making friends is a good thing, too. It means she wants to be close with that kid...
1506200017.korean: 그래, 짐도 친구를 사귀는 건 좋은 일이라 생각한다.&n그 아이와 친하게 지내고 싶다는 뜻이니…

1506200018.english: But! You also need to be selective about the friends you make!
1506200018.korean: 하지만! 친구는 좀 가려서 사귈 필요도 있느니라!

1506200019.english: I'm reminded of something said by that guy who lives somewhere, the one with the black eyepatch, who likes to fight...
1506200019.korean: - 어디 사는 검은색 안대를 하고 싸움을 좋아하는 녀석이 했던 말이 떠오르네…

1506200020.english: I heard that she made a new friend, so out of suspicion, I did a background check, and as a result…
1506200020.korean: 새로 친구를 사귀었다 하여 혹시나 하는 마음에 뒷조사를 한 결과…

1506200021.english: Isn't it true that she has a criminal record of raiding a warehouse not long ago!
1506200021.korean: 무려, 얼마 전에 창고를 습격한 범죄 이력이 있는 게 아니겠느냐!

1506200022.english: - …Huh? Raidd the warehouse a while ago…?

1506200023.english: Even though they are fellow Orca members... who knows what kind of negative impact someone with a criminal record will have on 'that child'...
1506200023.korean: 아무리 같은 오르카 대원이라지만… 범죄 이력이 있는 자가 '그 아이'에게 어떤 악영향을 끼칠지…

1506200026.english: By the way, Princess? Background checks? That sounds like an unusual word. What on earth are you doing?
1506200026.korean: - 그런데 공주님? 뒷조사라니?&n평범하지 않은 단어가 나온 것 같은데, 대체 무엇을 하고 계신 겁니까?

1506200027.english: I heard that guy is called the 'Golden Dragon of Greed' and loves gold more than anyone!
1506200027.korean: 그 녀석은 '탐욕의 황금용'이라 불리며, 누구보다 황금을 좋아한다고 들었다!

1506200029.english: It is said that before joining Orca, she used her subordinates to travel the world and plunder gold!
1506200029.korean: 오르카에 합류하기 전에는 부하들은 이용해 세상을 돌아다니며 황금을 약탈했다고 한다!

1506200030.english: Since the world has ended, it isn't exactly looting, but that's not entirely wrong...
1506200030.korean: - 세상이 멸망했으니 약탈은 아니지만, 완전 틀린 말은 아니긴 하지…

1506200031.english: Also, according to someone who used to be her close associate, she is a fool who would never listen to anyone else!
1506200031.korean: 또 측근이었던 자의 이야기로는 다른 사람의 말은 죽어도 안 듣는 바보라고 한다!

1506200032.english: - Sterling… you’ve really been through a lot…

1506200033.english: If by any chance 'that child' sees and learns bad behavior…!
1506200033.korean: 행여라도 '그 아이'가 나쁜 짓을 보고 배우기라도 하면…!

1506200034.english: Alright, shall we raid the warehouse and steal the gold again today?
1506200034.korean: 자, 오늘도 창고를 습격해서 황금을 털어볼까?

1506200036.english: If I cause a power outage in the warehouse, you take the gold from the warehouse in the meantime.
1506200036.korean: 내가 창고에서 정전을 일으키면 너는 그 사이에 창고의 황금을 가져오는 거야.

1506200038.english: Hahaha, of course! I am the Golden Dragon of Greed! I will stop at nothing to get my hands on gold!
1506200038.korean: 후후후, 당연하지!&n나는 탐욕의 황금용! 황금을 손에 넣기 위해서는 수단과 방법을 가리지 않아!

1506200039.english: Indeed, it is the Golden Dragon of Greed! How magnificent!

1506200040.english: To become the owner of all the treasures in this world!
1506200040.korean: 이 세상 모든 보물의 주인이 되기 위해!

1506200041.english: To become the owner of the treasure!

1506200042.english: Princess of the True Ancestors, what are you doing now…?
1506200042.korean: 진조의 프린세스여, 지금 무엇을 하는 것이냐…?

1506200043.english: The Princess of the True Ancestors is a being who has escaped the mundane world to walk a new path of destiny. Such gold holds no value to us!
1506200043.korean: 진조의 프린세스는 속세에서 벗어나 새로운 운명의 길을 걷는 존재.&n그런 황금따위는 우리에게 아무런 가치도 없느니라!

1506200044.english: Hmph, I much prefer dazzling gold to escaped fate!
1506200044.korean: 흥, 짐은 벗어난 운명보다 눈부시게 빛나는 황금이 훨씬 좋도다!

1506200045.english: A golden land that shines forever and lasts forever! Gathering all the treasures of this world is my new goal and dream!
1506200045.korean: 영원히 빛나고, 영원히 이어지는 황금향!&n이 세상의 보물을 전부 모으는 게 짐의 새로운 목표이자 꿈이니라!

1506200046.english: That's it! As expected, it's my new treasure!
1506200046.korean: 바로 그거지! 역시 나의 새로운 보물이야!

1506200048.english: I am none other than the Princess of Greed, the Land of Gold!

1506200050.english: No matter what happens, we must stop that!!!
1506200050.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 그것만큼은 막아야 한다!!!

1506200052.english: Just then, the terminal the Cyclops Princess was holding rang.
1506200052.korean: - 그때 사이클롭스 프린세스가 가지고 있던 단말기가 울렸다.

1506200053.english: ...So it is Jim who was a saint.

1506200054.english: What's the matter? I'm busy right now.

1506200055.english: [c][00FF00][Little me? I'm not entirely sure, but I heard you're looking for LRL.][-][/c]
1506200055.korean: [c][00FF00][작은 저? 잘은 모르겠지만 LRL을 찾고 있다고 들어서요.][-][/c]

1506200056.english: [c][00FF00][I was just on my way back from having a drink with the Horde when I ran into LRL with someone I’d never seen before… ][-][/c]
1506200056.korean: [c][00FF00][제가 방금 호드 분들하고 한잔하고 돌아오는 길에, 처음 보는 분이랑 같이 있는 LRL와 만났…][-][/c]

1506200057.english: Where is that place!! I'll go right now!!

1506200058.english: [c][00FF00][What? If it's LRL, the two of you head towards the warehouse… ][-][/c]

1506200059.english: Understood! I'll be there right away!

1506200060.english: Fafnir…! I will not let 'that child' be corrupted! I will protect the Princess of the True Ancestors!
1506200060.korean: 파프니르…! 네 녀석이 '그 아이'를 타락하게 두지 않겠느니라!&n진조의 프린세스는 짐이 지키겠다!

1506200061.english: Shouting that, the Cyclops Princess ran toward the warehouse.
1506200061.korean: - 그렇게 외치곤 사이클롭스 프린세스는 창고 쪽으로 달려 나갔다.

1506200062.english: It seems Cyclops Princess didn't know that LRL had raided the warehouse several times already.
1506200062.korean: - 아무래도 사이클롭스 프린세스는 LRL이 지금까지 창고를 몇 번이나 습격했다는 걸 몰랐나 보다.

1506200063.english: Should the Child Protection Act be reviewed once again?
1506200063.korean: - 어린이 보호법을 다시 한번 검토해야 하나…

1506200064.english: And I nodded at the fact I learned once again today.
1506200064.korean: - 그리고 나는 오늘 다시 한번 알게 된 사실에 고개를 끄덕였다.

1506200065.english: - Cyclops Princess. The Princess of the True Ancestors is…

1506200066.english: - LRL was a fool again today.

1506200067.english: How this matter ended is another story.
1506200067.korean: - 이 일의 결말이 어떻게 끝났는지는 또 다른 이야기이다.

1506200068.english: What's wrong with that urgent look on your face?

1506200069.english: If it's LRL, I haven't seen it.

1506200072.english: Have you calmed down a bit now?

1506200074.english: Sorry, could you explain it in more detail?

1506200075.english: Isn't making new friends a good thing?
1506200075.korean: 새로운 친구를 사귀는 건 좋은 일이 아니야?

1506200077.english: The bioroid that LRL is said to have recently made is…
1506200077.korean: 그 LRL이 새로 사귀었다고 하는 바이오로이드는…

1506300001.english: A few days have passed since Caracas was attacked.
1506300001.korean: - 카라카스가 공격 받은 뒤로 며칠이 흘렀다.

1506300002.english: It was an incident that could have easily led to large-scale casualties, but thanks to Labiata's quick judgment and response, it was averted without major damage.
1506300002.korean: - 자칫하면 대규모 인명 피해로 이어질 뻔한 사건이었지만, 라비아타의 빠른 판단과 대응 덕분에 큰 피해 없이 넘어갈 수 있었다.

1506300003.english: Restoration work in Caracas is going smoothly. There was almost no damage to buildings because the raid was not intended for destruction.
1506300003.korean: 카라카스 복구 작업은 순조로워요.&n이번 습격이 파괴가 목적은 아니었던 덕분에 건물 피해는 거의 없었어요.

1506300004.english: However, it seems it will take time to completely remove the sprayed poison.
1506300004.korean: 하지만 살포된 독을 완전히 제거하는 데 시간이 걸릴 것 같아요.

1506300005.english: In addition, all goods and crops produced at the time were discarded.
1506300005.korean: 또한, 당시 생산된 물품과 농작물은 모두 폐기했어요.

1506300008.english: Labiata shook her head with a troubled expression.
1506300008.korean: - 라비아타는 난처한 표정을 지으며 고개를 저었다.

1506300009.english: Yes… the doctor says the damage is too severe to investigate.
1506300009.korean: 네… 닥터 말로는 손상이 너무 심해서 조사할 방법이 없다고 해요.

1506300010.english: After suppressing the T-1 Goblins that raided Caracas, some of the surviving individuals were captured.
1506300010.korean: - 카라카스를 습격한 T-1 고블린을 진압한 이후, 일부 살아남은 개체들을 포획할 수 있었다.

1506300011.english: However, during the transport process, all the goblins, including the corpses, began to melt and burn all at once.
1506300011.korean: - 하지만 이송하는 과정에서 시체를 포함한 모든 고블린들이 일제히 녹아내리며 불타오르기 시작했고.

1506300012.english: In the end, everything was damaged beyond recognition.
1506300012.korean: - 결국은 모두 형체를 알아볼 수 없을 정도로 훼손되었다.

1506300013.english: - It must be like insurance to prevent them from handing over information to us.
1506300013.korean: - 우리에게 정보를 넘겨주지 않기 위한 보험 같은 거겠지.

1506300014.english: I investigated again, but the official records state that all T-1 Goblins were scrapped more than 100 years ago.
1506300014.korean: 다시 한번 조사를 해보았지만, T-1 고블린은 100년도 더 지난 옛날에 모두 폐기되었다는 게 공식 자료에요.

1506300015.english: There is no record anywhere that it was produced again after that.
1506300015.korean: 그 뒤로 다시 제작되었다는 자료는 어디에도 없어요.

1506300016.english: But the fact that it has reappeared like this... even modified...
1506300016.korean: 그런데 이렇게 다시… 심지어 개조까지 되어 나타났다는 건…

1506300017.english: The claim of disposal is false; it would be more accurate to say that PECS discovered and awakened a T-1 Goblin that had been secretly stored somewhere.
1506300017.korean: 폐기는 거짓이고 어딘가에 몰래 보관 중이던 T-1 고블린을, PECS에서 발견하여 깨웠다고 보는 게 맞겠죠.

1506300018.english: Omega occupied San Diego, where Black River's former headquarters were located. It would not be surprising if they knew the fact that the Goblin was asleep and its location at that time.
1506300018.korean: - 오메가는 예전 블랙리버의 본사가 있는 샌디에이고를 점령했다.&n그때 고블린이 잠들어 있다는 사실과 장소를 알았다 해도 이상하지 않다.

1506300020.english: According to records from that time, tens of thousands of T-1 Goblins were scrapped at Black River headquarters.
1506300020.korean: 당시의 자료에 따르면 수만 대에 이르는 T-1 고블린을 블랙리버 본사에서 폐기했다고 되어있어요.

1506300021.english: If we assume that you have obtained all of it intact…
1506300021.korean: 만약 그 전부를 고스란히 손에 넣었다고 가정한다면…

1506300022.english: According to Merlin, even Gamma didn't know about this. She knew that Omega and Zeta were plotting something, but it seems she didn't know the full story.
1506300022.korean: 멀린 말로는 감마조차 이 사실을 몰랐다고 하오.&n오메가와 제타가 무슨 일을 꾸미고 있다는 건 알았지만, 그 내막까지는 몰랐나 보오.

1506300023.english: Why are you acting like that? Why are you looking at my face like that?
1506300023.korean: 왜 그러시오? 소관의 얼굴을 그렇게 보고?

1506300024.english: As for Gamma's affairs, it is not a matter that requires adaptation for the person in charge.
1506300024.korean: 감마의 일이라면 소관에게 있어 적응이 필요한 일은 아니오.

1506300025.english: Didn't I tell you? That Gamma and Sogwan once fought the enemy back-to-back.
1506300025.korean: 말하지 않았소?&n감마와 소관은 서로 등을 맞대고 적과 싸운 적이 있다고.

1506300026.english: It would be different if it were an enemy, but now that Gamma has joined Orca, it is simply a return to that time.
1506300026.korean: 적이라면 모를까 감마가 오르카에 합류한 지금,&n다시 그때로 돌아갔을 뿐이오.

1506300027.english: Gamma remained on the northern front due to command of Poseidon's fleet, but since Merlin is with her, there is no need to worry too much.
1506300027.korean: 감마는 포세이돈 함대의 지휘 때문에 북부 전선에 남았지만, 멀린이 같이 있으니 크게 걱정할 일은 없을 거요.

1506300028.english: I'm actually more worried about that...

1506300030.english: Haha, if the person wants it, why would I refuse?
1506300030.korean: 후후, 본인이 원하는데 소관이 마다할 이유가 어디에 있겠소.

1506300031.english: And Merlin was originally created to serve as Poseidon's advisor, wasn't she?
1506300031.korean: 그리고 본래 멀린은 포세이돈의 참모 역할을 하기 위해 만들어진 바이오로이드이지 않소.

1506300032.english: I believe that I have finally gone to the place where I was originally supposed to go.
1506300032.korean: 본디 갔어야 할 자리에 이제야 갔다고 소관은 생각하오.

1506300033.english: The captain of the Poseidon fleet doesn't seem to have accepted it very gladly, though...
1506300033.korean: - 그 포세이돈 함대의 대장은 그리 달갑게 받아들인 것 같지는 않지만…

1506300035.english: Artificial Iron Bug appearing on the northern front. And the T-1 Goblin that attacked Caracas.
1506300035.korean: - 북부 전선에 나타난 인공 철충.&n그리고 카라카스를 공격한 T-1 고블린.

1506300036.english: Either way, it is clear that this was orchestrated by PECS.
1506300036.korean: - 어느 쪽이든 PECS에서 꾸민 일이라는 건 분명하다.

1506300037.english: I don't know what the purpose is or what is desired, but it feels like something else is going to happen sooner or later…
1506300037.korean: - 무엇을 원하는지 그 목적은 알 수 없지만, 조만간 또 다른 무언가가 일어날 것 같은…

1506300042.english: Oh my? Are you not putting an espresso shot in the energy drink today?
1506300042.korean: 어머? 오늘은 에너지 드링크에 에스프레소 샷은 안 넣는 건가요?

1506300043.english: Yes, because there is no need to add an espresso shot anymore.
1506300043.korean: 네, 이제 에스프레소 샷을 넣을 정도의 일은 없으니까요.

1506300044.english: I slept for a whopping 2 hours, 28 minutes, and 27 seconds yesterday, you know?

1506300046.english: Hehehe... You have no idea how long I've been waiting for this day.
1506300046.korean: 우후후… 제가 이날을 얼마나 기다려왔는지 몰라요.

1506300047.english: The days of pouring caffeine every day to connect the whole world as one…
1506300047.korean: 온 세상을 하나로 연결하기 위해 매일 카페인을 퍼붓던 나날들…

1506300049.english: Although we haven't yet connected the whole world as one, wherever Orca's hand reaches, there is now no place unreached by the Orca Network's radio waves.
1506300049.korean: 아직 온 세상을 하나로 연결하지는 못했지만, 오르카의 손이 닿는 곳이라면 오르카 네트워크의 전파망이 닿지 않는 곳은 이제 없어요.

1506300050.english: Even if the power expands, you can simply install a new communication network in that area.
1506300050.korean: 세력이 확장된다 하더라도 그 지역에 새로운 통신망을 설치하면 그만이죠.

1506300051.english: Now is the time to return to being an intelligent, beautiful, and capable urban career woman!
1506300051.korean: 이제 이지적이고 아름다운, 유능한 도시의 커리어 우먼으로 돌아갈 때예요!

1506300052.english: Sob... Sob... I fought really hard...

1506300053.english: Yes, that's right. You did a great job. I know better than anyone how hard you've worked, Yumi.
1506300053.korean: 네, 맞아요. 정말 잘하셨어요.&n유미 양의 노력은 누구보다 제가 잘 알고 있어요.

1506300054.english: Next, try to get at least 4 hours of sleep a day.
1506300054.korean: 다음은 하루에 4시간은 잘 수 있도록 노력해 봐요.

1506300056.english: Hmm... wouldn't that be too much to ask for right now?

1506300059.english: What is this? This ominous feeling of déjà vu…?
1506300059.korean: 뭐죠? 이 불길한 느낌이 드는 데자뷰는…?

1506300060.english: Yumi! Powerful electromagnetic waves are damaging communication network facilities in some areas!
1506300060.korean: 유미 양! 일부 지역에서 강력한 전자기파가 통신망 시설을 망가트리고 있어요!

1506300063.english: If it is that place, we recently stayed up all night and barely managed to install equipment on the outskirts…
1506300063.korean: 거기라면 저희가 최근에 날밤을 새우며 겨우겨우 외곽에 장비를 설치한…

1506300066.english: It looks like it exploded due to an overload...

1506300067.english: I'll have to look into the exact cause of the electromagnetic waves.
1506300067.korean: 전자기파가 어떤 원인으로 발생한 건지 자세히 알아봐야겠네요.

1506300069.english: Are you going to add an espresso shot...?

1506300070.english: (Pour an espresso shot into the energy drink.)

1506300071.english: (Pour an espresso shot into the energy drink...)

1506300072.english: (Pour an espresso shot into the energy drink…)

1506300074.english: It can't be helped... because safety comes first.
1506300074.korean: 어쩔 수 없지… 안전이 최우선 이니까.

1506300075.english: Alpha continues to take care of Caracas along with Beta.
1506300075.korean: 카라카스는 베타와 함께 알파가 계속 관리해 줘.

1506300076.english: So, next is... Labiata, what happened with that?
1506300076.korean: 그럼, 다음은... 라비아타 그건 어떻게 됐어?

1506300077.english: guess it was too much after all…

1506300079.english: It must mean that tens of thousands of troops have formed in PECS.

1506300081.english: No, I thought I adapted quickly...

1506300083.english: I mean allowing Merlin to transfer to the Poseidon fleet.
1506300083.korean: 멀린을 포세이돈 함대로 인사이동을 허락한 거 말이야.

1506400015.english: You should have said so if it was urgent.

1506400016.english: I'll keep an eye on this place, so hurry up and go.
1506400016.korean: 여기는 내가 보고 있을 테니까 어서 다녀와.

1506400018.english: What's wrong? Why aren't you coming back right away?

1506400023.english: Yeah… very… refreshing… held out… for a long… so… I feel good…
1506400023.korean: 응… 매우… 상쾌…&n오래… 참음… 그래서… 기분 좋아…

1506400024.english: I recommend giving it a try...

1506400026.english: Anyway, I infiltrated the North American region to gather intelligence on the Lord's orders...
1506400026.korean: 그건 그렇고, 주공의 명을 받아 정보 수집을 위해 북미 지역에 잠입했는데...

1506400027.english: If I return like this without any gains, I will have no face to show you, Lord.
1506400027.korean: 이대로 아무 수확도 없이 돌아가는 건, 주공을 볼 면목이 없어요.

1506400029.english: But I can't just blindly walk into the heavily guarded interior either...
1506400029.korean: 그렇다고 경비가 삼엄한 안쪽으로 무턱대고 들어갈 수도 없고…

1506400033.english: It calmed down...? Are you okay, sis?

1506400036.english: What is this…? The sky has turned red…?

1506400037.english: What on earth is happening… Huh? What on earth is that…?
1506400037.korean: 대체 무슨 일이 일어나고…&n앗? 저건 대체…?

1506400041.english: Wait, wait, calm down. I'm not an enemy.

1506400043.english: Phew... I barely made it out... I really almost got a game over. Well then...
1506400043.korean: 휴… 겨우 빠져나왔네… 하마터면 정말로 게임 오버가 될 뻔했어.&n자, 그럼…

1506400044.english: We don't have much time. I need to inform the commander of what is happening here right away.
1506400044.korean: 시간이 많이 없어.&n어서 사령관에게 이곳에서 일어나는 일을 알려야 해.

1506500001.english: I will summarize the situation as known so far.

1506500002.english: 48 hours ago, electromagnetic waves were generated centered around Michigan in North America. All communications were paralyzed not only in the state but also in the surrounding areas.
1506500002.korean: 지금으로부터 48시간 전, 북미 지역의 미시간 주를 중심으로 전자기파가 발생.&n해당 주는 물론 외곽 지역까지 모든 통신이 마비되었습니다.

1506500003.english: And according to the testimony of a member who returned from intelligence activities at the scene, a loud rumbling occurred, and immediately afterward, the surrounding sky turned red.
1506500003.korean: 그리고 현장에서 첩보 활동을 하고 돌아온 대원의 증언으로는, 큰 땅울림이 발생하였고 그 직후 주변 하늘이 붉게 변했다고 합니다.

1506500004.english: More than a day has passed since the incident occurred, but communication disruptions and the red sky remain.
1506500004.korean: 상황 발생으로부터 하루가 넘는 시간이 지났지만, 통신 장애와 붉은 하늘은 여전한 상태입니다.

1506500005.english: I will explain that to you. I have some information I heard from Aeda as well.
1506500005.korean: 그건 제가 설명해 드릴게요.&n에이다 님으로부터 전해 들은 정보도 있으니까요.

1506500006.english: First of all, if you are in an outlying area far from the central hub in Michigan, the electromagnetic waves are not very strong. Neither Bio-Roids nor AGS will be significantly affected unless it is for an extended period. If there is any impact, it would only cause simple communication disruptions.
1506500006.korean: 먼저 중심지인 미시간 주에서 떨어진 외곽 지역이라면 전자기파가 그리 강하지 않아요.&n바이오로이드는 물론 AGS도 장시간이 아니라면 큰 영향은 없을 거예요.&n영향을 준다면 단순 통신 장애를 발생시키는 정도죠.

1506500007.english: However, the situation is different in Michigan, the epicenter of this phenomenon.
1506500007.korean: 하지만 이번 현상의 중심 지역인 미시간 주는 상황이 달라요.

1506500008.english: Not only are powerful electromagnetic waves emitted, but a massive energy barrier is generated across the surrounding area, blocking all interference from the outside.
1506500008.korean: 강력한 전자기파는 물론이고 주변 일대에 거대한 에너지 방벽이 생성되어, 외부에서 들어오는 모든 간섭을 차단하고 있어요.

1506500009.english: It would be correct to assume that the one who caused this phenomenon erected a barrier to avoid being disturbed.
1506500009.korean: 이 현상을 일으킨 자가, 방해받지 않기 위해 방벽을 세워두었다고 보는 게 맞겠죠.

1506500010.english: I can't deny the possibility, but considering what has happened so far, I don't think it was Omega's doing.
1506500010.korean: 가능성은 부정할 수 없지만, 지금까지 있었던 일들을 생각하면 저는 오메가의 짓이 아니라고 생각해요.

1506500012.english: I honestly don't even know if Omega is in North America right now... its whereabouts are unknown.
1506500012.korean: 현재 북미에 오메가가 있는지조차...&n솔직히 말해 행방이 불명이에요.

1506500013.english: Until recently, strict security was in place across North America, but now that security has vanished without a trace. Team members are currently searching the entire region.
1506500013.korean: 얼마 전까지만 해도 북미 전체에 엄중한 경비를 세워두었는데, 지금은 그 경비가 감쪽같이 사라졌어요. 현재 대원들이 북미 전역을 수색하는 중이죠.

1506500014.english: Even so, seeing that there is still no reaction from Omega, I can only conclude that their whereabouts are unknown...
1506500014.korean: 그런데도 아직도 오메가의 반응이 없는 걸로 봐서 행방이 불명하다고밖에는...

1506500015.english: - It's that Omega... Maybe she's acting to let our guard down?
1506500015.korean: - 그 오메가다… 어쩌면 우리를 방심시키기 위해 연기를 하는 건 아닐까?

1506500016.english: However, even if all of this was orchestrated by Omega, it is difficult to accept that they so readily handed over North America, which they have strictly guarded until now.
1506500016.korean: - 하지만 이 모든 게 오메가가 꾸민 일이라고 해도, 지금까지 엄중하게 지켜온 북미를 이렇게 선뜻 내어준 건 납득하기가 어렵다.

1506500017.english: I muttered a name that came to mind inadvertently.

1506500018.english: - It has been confirmed through the events on the Northern Front and in Caracas that Zeta is hostile to Orca and is plotting something.
1506500018.korean: - 북부 전선과 카라카스에서의 일로 제타가 오르카에게 적대적인 존재이며, 무언가 꾸미고 있다는 건 확인되었다.

1506500019.english: - If this phenomenon was orchestrated by Zeta rather than Omega, then what on earth was the purpose…
1506500019.korean: - 만약 이 현상이 오메가가 아닌 제타가 꾸민 일이라 한다면 그 목적은 대체…

1506500020.english: Your Majesty, that is… merely a possibility, but…

1506500021.english: For some reason, Armand couldn't readily open her mouth in response to my question.
